description.lt: Vasaros susiburiamas prie ezero — degime, banios ir gerai nuoteikos.
description.en: A summer gathering at the lake — a bonfire, swims, and great spirits.

imageAlt.lt: Seima sypso prie ezero saulei leidiantis
imageAlt.en: Family smiling by the lake at sunset

description.lt: Sekmadienio pietys su visu puodu kugelio ir seneles sypsnys.
description.en: Sunday lunch with a full pot of kugelis and grandma's warmest smile.

imageAlt.en: Grandma in the kitchen with a traditional dish

description.lt: Anksti ryta vaikai zbega laiptais zr dovaneles. Akys degancio.
description.en: Kids rushing downstairs at dawn to find their gifts. Eyes like lanterns.

description.lt: Sielow kekso pjaustymas sode — visos tris kartos po vienu stogu.
description.en: Cutting the birthday cake in the garden — three generations under one roof.

imageAlt.en: Family members around a cake outdoors

description.lt: Papluste Palangoje — kregzdeles leido ant bangu ir kojomis liete jura.
description.en: A dip in Palanga — skimming waves and getting toes wet in the Baltic.

description.lt: Gele, kuprine, didziule sypena — pirmojo diena visuomet.
description.en: A flower, a backpack, a huge smile — the first day always will be.

imageAlt.lt: Vaikas su gelyte pirmaja mokyklos diena
imageAlt.en: Child with a flower on the first school day

description.lt: Obelys dar zydejo kai mes rinkome brazkeles. Senelis mokytojas, mes — mokiniai.
description.en: Apple trees still bloomed while we picked strawberries. Grandpa — the teacher, us — pupils.

imageAlt.en: Children and grandfather in the garden

description.lt: Blynai su spirguciais, Morevidimas — visa seima laukia pavasario.
description.en: Pancakes with cracklings, Morė burning — the whole family awaiting spring.

description.lt: Senamiestis, Gedimino pilis, mese gale ir ledo kreamai — viena geriausiu dienu.
description.en: Old town, Gediminas' Tower, a walk and ice creams at the end — one of the best days.

description.lt: Paskutines sekundes, fejerwerkai ir noras, kad daugiau tokiu naktu.
description.en: Last seconds, fireworks, and a wish for more nights just like this one.
